title: CP0 Comes to Egghead
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Robin, Kid, Unknown person #8, Dorry, Unknown person #9 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yer Mom is an Honorable woman!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Be proud, Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: ohara fought Da World!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: SOBSOB

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait, helmet! You made our Robin cry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't forgive you, vegapunk! Let our feet go, you bastard! >>

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Vegapunk

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I have been using

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ohara did try to expose that "kingdom" just as you predicted.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. Then it was really the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know what happened to the books in the lake?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that time, I wanted to bring them to punk hazard..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But my plea to the higher-ups fell on deaf ears.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Actually...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That day, I encountered those guys.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 22 years ago in Ohara in West Blue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: months later after the buster call incident

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who are those guys in the ruins?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It's the Giants!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yosh! Pull it up!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Why are the Giants here!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What'll they do? Do they know the value of those books!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's been a while!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can recognize you by looking at that stand out hair of yours!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why are you here?!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: That's my line, vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your head became larger than before, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: I was clover's acquain- Lance

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So you too, huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew him when he was a rough guy who traveled around the world.

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: They came from Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To label him as someone who tried to destroy the world is..

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Are you interested in those giants?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I just checked with them earlier, they're not bandits.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Unbelievable! That must be some information manipulation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They knew the value of those books.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their captain is a strange guy with bandages covering his body.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "World Government" is a massive organization, especially the Navy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: However, though

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a lot of people who can understand me. Don't lose your objective, dragon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He said, "I won't let the assets that ohara left become erased from history".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys from the world government didn't realize its value.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So I'm glad they didn't destroy it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wait! I'm not...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm tired of hearing it.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Even you have become the government's laptop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though we the liberation has invited you and you rejected it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be ridiculous! Even with my wisdom and technology,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What can your poor army make?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're still a blunt guy as usual, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I know! But this incident...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pisses me off!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 55 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
